top.aston: the Aston Martin Driving Experience in London
top.text: Feel the thrill of racing by taking a passenger seat in an Aston Martin GT4 race car at the hands of a professional racing driver. Receive expert tuition from professionally trained instructors, before driving a variety of Aston Martin road cars on a range of demanding surfaces including the alpine road featured in the James Bond epic «Casino Royale»!

main.package: The Aston Martin Driving Experience package includes:
main.4-list: Expert tutoring and the Aston Martin driving experience
main.promo: For your chance to win simply make a deposit using the promo-code:
main.cta-text: Each dollar you deposit will equal 1 entry ticket. Larger deposits, as well as multiple entries, will increase your chances. Winners will be selected at random via lottery and contacted personally by September 20th.
